---
title: "Appendix C: Errata — NASA/CR-2002-211652"
---

This appendix documents confirmed errors in the original 2002 reference:

> Altus, T.D. (2002). *A Response Surface Methodology for Bi-Level Integrated
> System Synthesis (BLISS)*. NASA/CR-2002-211652. May 2002.

Errors are classified as **mathematical** (affect results or implementation) or
**typographical** (presentation only, no effect on correctness).

---

## Errata Table

| ID | Location in 2002 Paper | Type | Description | Effect on Implementation | Status in This Work |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| E1 | App. A, Eq. A2 | **Mathematical** | Distance formula prints $\sqrt{\sum(X_{A_i} - X_{B_i})}$ — missing square on difference term. Correct: $\sqrt{\sum(X_{A_i} - X_{B_i})^2}$ | Would produce incorrect inter-point distances and broken antibunching if implemented as printed | Julia uses correct squared Euclidean distance. See @sec-antibunching. |
| E2 | Fig. 41, axis label | Typographical | Units label reads "nm" (nanometres). Intended: "NM" (nautical miles). Range values throughout paper are in nautical miles. | None | This work uses "NM" consistently. See @sec-breguet. |
| E3 | Fig. 19, caption | Typographical | "Hypershpere" — missing letter 'e'. | None | Corrected throughout. |
| E4 | Fig. 6, caption | Typographical | "Cross-sectionl" — missing letter 'a'. | None | Corrected throughout. |
| E5 | p. 20, body text | Typographical | "Aany" — double 'a', should be "Any". | None | Corrected throughout. |

---

## Notes

- E1 is the only error with potential implementation consequences. All other entries are
  typographical and do not affect the mathematics or results.
- This errata list covers errors identified during the 2026 IV&V review. It is not
  claimed to be exhaustive.
- The full IV&V report is maintained separately at `ivv/ivv-bliss-rs-2002.md`.
